GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [cntrycode@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[cntrycode@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[cntrycode@0 as cntrycode, count(*)@1 as numcust, sum(custsale.c_acctbal)@2 as totacctbal]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[cntrycode], aggr=[count(*), sum(custsale.c_acctbal)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([cntrycode@0], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[cntrycode], aggr=[count(*), sum(custsale.c_acctbal)]
              GpuProjectExec: expr=[substr(c_phone@0, 1, 2) as cntrycode, c_acctbal@1 as c_acctbal]
                GpuNestedLoopJoinExec: join_type=Inner, filter=CAST(c_acctbal@0 AS Decimal128(19, 6)) > avg(customer.c_acctbal)@1, projection=[1, 2]
                  GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[avg(customer.c_acctbal)]
                    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
                      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[avg(customer.c_acctbal)]
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                          GpuFilterExec: predicate=c_acctbal@1 > Some(0),15,2 AND (substr(c_phone@0, 1, 2) = 13 OR substr(c_phone@0, 1, 2) = 31 OR substr(c_phone@0, 1, 2) = 23 OR substr(c_phone@0, 1, 2) = 29 OR substr(c_phone@0, 1, 2) = 30 OR substr(c_phone@0, 1, 2) = 18 OR substr(c_phone@0, 1, 2) = 17), projection=[1]
                            GpuScanExec: batch_size=19173961
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                    GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=LeftAnti, on=[(c_custkey@0, o_custkey@0)], projection=[1, 2]
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_custkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                            GpuFilterExec: predicate=substr(c_phone@1, 1, 2) = 13 OR substr(c_phone@1, 1, 2) = 31 OR substr(c_phone@1, 1, 2) = 23 OR substr(c_phone@1, 1, 2) = 29 OR substr(c_phone@1, 1, 2) = 30 OR substr(c_phone@1, 1, 2) = 18 OR substr(c_phone@1, 1, 2) = 17
                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=19173961
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_custkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                          GpuScanExec: batch_size=19173961
--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=2008
GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112, estimate_input_bytes=56, estimate_output_bytes=56, estimate_cost=112
  GpuSortExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112, estimate_input_bytes=56, estimate_output_bytes=56, estimate_cost=112
    GpuProjectExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112, estimate_input_bytes=56, estimate_output_bytes=56, estimate_cost=112
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112, estimate_input_bytes=56, estimate_output_bytes=56, estimate_cost=112
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112, estimate_input_bytes=56, estimate_output_bytes=56, estimate_cost=112
          GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112, estimate_input_bytes=56, estimate_output_bytes=56, estimate_cost=112
            GpuAggregateExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112, estimate_input_bytes=48, estimate_output_bytes=56, estimate_cost=104
              GpuProjectExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=112, estimate_input_bytes=48, estimate_output_bytes=48, estimate_cost=96
                GpuNestedLoopJoinExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=112, estimate_input_bytes=64, estimate_output_bytes=48, estimate_cost=112
                  GpuAggregateExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, estimate_input_bytes=24, estimate_output_bytes=16, estimate_cost=40
                    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, estimate_input_bytes=24, estimate_output_bytes=24, estimate_cost=48
                      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, estimate_input_bytes=16, estimate_output_bytes=24, estimate_cost=40
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, estimate_input_bytes=16, estimate_output_bytes=16, estimate_cost=32
                          GpuFilterExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, estimate_input_bytes=48, estimate_output_bytes=16, estimate_cost=64
                            GpuScanExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=48, estimate_input_bytes=0, estimate_output_bytes=48, estimate_cost=48
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=112, estimate_input_bytes=48, estimate_output_bytes=48, estimate_cost=96
                    GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=112, estimate_input_bytes=64, estimate_output_bytes=48, estimate_cost=112
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112, estimate_input_bytes=56, estimate_output_bytes=56, estimate_cost=112
                        GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112, estimate_input_bytes=56, estimate_output_bytes=56, estimate_cost=112
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112, estimate_input_bytes=56, estimate_output_bytes=56, estimate_cost=112
                            GpuFilterExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112, estimate_input_bytes=56, estimate_output_bytes=56, estimate_cost=112
                              GpuScanExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=56, estimate_input_bytes=0, estimate_output_bytes=56, estimate_cost=56
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=8, estimate_input_bytes=8, estimate_output_bytes=8, estimate_cost=16
                        GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=8, estimate_input_bytes=8, estimate_output_bytes=8, estimate_cost=16
                          GpuScanExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=8, estimate_input_bytes=0, estimate_output_bytes=8, estimate_cost=8
